R0207.title: eSIM/iSIM Hijacking
R0207.definition: Remote provisioning capabilities of embedded SIM (eSIM) and integrated SIM (iSIM) are exploited by attackers for SIM hijacking and identity theft.

references.title: Privacy and data protection in mobile applications - ENISA

R0207.description: Remote provisioning capabilities of embedded SIM (eSIM) and integrated SIM (iSIM) are exploited by attackers for SIM hijacking and identity theft.
R0207.influence: May cause business abuse, data exposure, financial loss, compliance impact, or supply-chain propagation.
